seoTitle: Curyo vs Daisy Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Curyo and Daisy Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Curyo vs Daisy Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Curyo and Daisy Hill.
heading: Curyo vs Daisy Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Curyo, Victoria and Daisy Hill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Daisy Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Curyo (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Curyo or Daisy Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Curyo has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Daisy Hill scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Curyo scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Daisy Hill scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Curyo or Daisy Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Daisy Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
